name.errorMessage: A workshop's name must start with a letter and can only include digits, lowercase letters, and hyphens joining them.

base.errorMessage: The base must be one of the supported values: ubuntu@20.04, ubuntu@22.04, ubuntu@24.04.

sdks.description: List of SDKs used in the workshop.

name.description: Name of the SDK. Optionally prefix with 'try-' or 'project-' exactly once to reference those sources.
name.errorMessage: An SDK's name must contain a letter, may have a single 'try-' or 'project-' prefix, must not chain prefixes, and the underlying name cannot be 'agent'.

channel.description: Channel used for the SDK. May be empty when the SDK is installed from a local source.
channel.errorMessage: Channel must be empty or follow the pattern <track>/<risk> (e.g., 'latest/stable').

^[a-z](?:-?[a-z0-9])*$.description: Plug definition. Provide any YAML value for inline plug attributes, or set 'bind' to reference another plug. When 'bind' is set, no other attributes may be defined.

bind.description: Reference to a plug in the form [<sdk>:]<plug>. If omitted, the SDK is 'system'.
bind.errorMessage: Bind reference must follow the pattern [<sdk>:]<plug>.

then.errorMessage: When 'bind' is set, no other attributes are allowed on the plug.

required.name: Each SDK must specify a name.

connections.description: List of connections between plugs and slots.

plug.description: Reference to a plug in the form [<sdk>:]<plug>. If omitted, the SDK is 'system'.
plug.errorMessage: Plug reference must follow the pattern [<sdk>:]<plug>.

slot.description: Reference to a slot in the form [<sdk>:]<slot>. If omitted, the SDK is 'system'.
slot.errorMessage: Slot reference must follow the pattern [<sdk>:]<slot>.

required.plug: Each connection must specify a plug.
required.slot: Each connection must specify a slot.

actions.description: List of actions to be run in the workshop.
actions.errorMessage: Action names must be unique and only appear once.
